pages.raw_text:
An effort is being made by the
American Federation of Labor to
unionize the hello girls employed
by the telephone company. About
so girls have Joined the union and
these so are actively PROSECUTING
among the remaining number.
The agitation for the formation of
this union has been in progress for
the past two months, but strict Sc
crecy has been maintained about the
matter among both employees and
telephone management. The agita-
ton was started by the electrical
workers union, with which the new
union will be affiliated.


There are about 1876 local phone
operators and 20 long distance oper-
ators. All work in the telephone
building except few who have in
charge private exchanges in different
business concerns. OF the local girls
between so and 80 are said to be in
cluded in the union movement. Thus
far. owing to the persuasive argu-
ments Of Manager Reynolds, all the
long distance girls have been kept
out.


At present the girls work eight
hours day. They 60 on in different
shifts at different hours. They work
about two hours and then have 10
minutes rest. followed by two hours
work, and then lunch. The lunch is
furnished by the company, as we'll as
a free reading room and telephones
at their homes. The half hour for
